title: Our patio just entered its main-character era
body: Fresh mural magic just landed in the outdoor seating. Fox energy, bear hugs, and coffee-date vibes painted right onto the fence. Suntrap seats are calling. Come sip, scroll, and stay awhile.

images.alt: New garden mural with a fox writing at a cafe table and a bear holding a tea tray
New garden mural with three bears sharing coffee under painted trees
